# Fintech Regulatory Issue Taxonomy (KR)

## Issue Categories

### Virtual asset custody
- Scope: Custody and safekeeping obligations for virtual asset service providers handling user-held assets [src_001].
- Sub-issues: segregation of customer assets; insurance requirements; reporting cadence.
- Default `output_mode`: `executive_brief`.

### Lending platform licensing
- Scope: Online lending platforms operating consumer credit channels [src_001].
- Sub-issues: registration thresholds; conduct rules; complaint handling.
- Default `output_mode`: `black_letter_commentary`.

### AML / KYC compliance
- Scope: Money-laundering prevention obligations for fintech operators [src_001].
- Sub-issues: customer due diligence; suspicious transaction reporting; record retention.
- Default `output_mode`: `executive_brief`.

### Consumer credit consumer protection
- Scope: Disclosure, cooling-off, and predatory-lending rules in consumer credit [src_001].
- Sub-issues: APR disclosure; cooling-off windows; collection practices.
- Default `output_mode`: `comparative_matrix`.

### Algorithmic trading oversight
- Scope: Supervisory regime for algorithmic and high-frequency trading [src_001].
- Sub-issues: registration; algorithm testing; market-maker obligations.
- Default `output_mode`: `enforcement_case_law`.
